# Highlands Home Services Network - llms.txt

[project]
name: Highlands Home Services Network
url: https://highlandshomeservicesnetwork.com
description: Hyperlocal, trade-neutral lead generation and referral service connecting Highlands County, Florida homeowners with DBPR-verified contractors.

[summary]
Highlands Home Services Network operates homeowner-facing websites that generate exclusive, screened leads for licensed contractors in Highlands County, Florida (Sebring, Avon Park, Lake Placid, Lorida, Venus). The network is trade-neutral and currently offers an active HVAC vertical with future plumbing, electrical, and roofing verticals planned.

[key-pages]
- Homepage: https://highlandshomeservicesnetwork.com/
- About: https://highlandshomeservicesnetwork.com/about.html
- How It Works: https://highlandshomeservicesnetwork.com/how-it-works.html
- HVAC Leads: https://highlandshomeservicesnetwork.com/hvac.html
- For Homeowners (HVAC service request): https://highlandshomeservicesnetwork.com/get-service.html
- Contractor Apply: https://highlandshomeservicesnetwork.com/apply.html
- Contact: https://highlandshomeservicesnetwork.com/contact.html
- Privacy: https://highlandshomeservicesnetwork.com/privacy.html
- Terms: https://highlandshomeservicesnetwork.com/terms.html

[content-notes]
- We are a digital lead generation and referral service only; we do not perform trade work.
- All contractors in the network must hold valid Florida trade licenses verified via the DBPR database.
- Leads are exclusive (never shared) and sold on a pay-per-lead basis.
- Service area is Highlands County, Florida only.

[files]
sitemap: https://highlandshomeservicesnetwork.com/sitemap.xml
robots: https://highlandshomeservicesnetwork.com/robots.txt
